name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade capability skills for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex). Seven battle-tested skills covering cloud infrastructure (DNS migration with cloudflare-dns, full Fly-to-AWS migration), research (deep-research across 8 sources), creative (terminal-poster infographics), and multi-agent orchestration (spec-to-ship greenfield builds, clean-sweep issue close-out). MIT licensed.
